name: Inventory + Transfers
manual_mismatches: Session 6 prerequisites were write-only where read-vs-write permissions are split in backend/frontend behavior.
Stock adjustments errors were missing backend-aligned validation outcomes (variantId required, loss reason required, batch not found, negative stock policy).
Stock counts and counts wizard errors were missing required/negative quantity paths and had weak offline guidance.
Stock movements guidance used generic business-context failure instead of branch-scope restriction as the operational blocker.

Transfers and transfer wizard entries missed key create/receive validation errors (items required, item quantity numeric, insufficient stock, source batch mismatch, approval-before-receive, closed transfer, received quantity over remaining).
Session 6 Swahili entries still contained English prerequisite lines.
manual_fixes_applied: Updated EN+SW Session 6 prerequisites to user-first language with explicit read/view versus write/action permission split.
Corrected stock adjustments common errors to backend-aligned operational outcomes.
Corrected stock counts and stock counts wizard common errors to include required quantity, negative quantity, offline restriction, and batch linkage failures.
Reduced stock movements error set to concrete branch-scope restriction behavior.
Expanded transfers and transfers wizard errors to backend-aligned create/receive/cancel validation outcomes.
Translated remaining Session 6 Swahili prerequisite lines to full Swahili.
Synchronized docs manual datasets to frontend runtime manual datasets.
